omitted_declarations.policy_reference: • User Generated Content: User-generated content, such as photos, images, videos, community posts, reviews, community comments, and other content or information that you generate, transmit, or otherwise make available on the Service, as well as associated metadata. Metadata includes information on how, when, where and by whom a piece of content was collected and how that content has been formatted or edited. Metadata also includes information that users can add or can have added to their content, such as keywords, geographical or location information, and other similar data.
